testcase.name: createEntityDraftState > initial state (no draft) > hasDraft is false when no draft has been set
createEntityDraftState > initial state (no draft) > isDirty is false when no draft has been set
createEntityDraftState > initial state (no draft) > withDraft returns the server entity when no draft exists
createEntityDraftState > initial state (no draft) > withDraft returns null when the entity does not exist
createEntityDraftState > after applying an update > hasDraft becomes true
createEntityDraftState > after applying an update > isDirty becomes true
createEntityDraftState > after applying an update > withDraft returns the merged entity (draft wins)
createEntityDraftState > after applying an update > the raw draft atom holds the full merged draftable data
createEntityDraftState > smart draft clearing > clears the draft automatically when updates bring values back to server state
createEntityDraftState > discarding a draft > clears the draft and restores server state
createEntityDraftState > discarding a draft > discard is a no-op when there is no draft
createEntityDraftState > update when entity is null > does nothing when the entity does not exist in the store
createEntityDraftState > excludeFields > does not count excluded fields when checking isDirty
createEntityDraftState > excludeFields > still detects dirty when a non-excluded field changes
createEntityDraftState > custom isDirty function > uses the provided isDirty function instead of the default
createEntityDraftState > partial field update > only changes the specified fields, leaving others intact
createEntityDraftState > partial field update > accumulates updates across multiple calls
loadable store > default state > mode is 'local' when no source is connected
loadable store > default state > columns default to an empty array
loadable store > default state > execution results default to an empty object
loadable store > default state > connected source defaults to all-null
loadable store > default state > linked runnable defaults to all-null
loadable store > default state > output mappings default to an empty array
loadable store > mode > switches to 'connected' when connectedSourceId is set
loadable store > mode > returns to 'local' when connectedSourceId is cleared
loadable store > connected source > reflects updated connected source information
loadable store > instance isolation > two loadable IDs do not share state
loadable store > output mappings > reflects output mappings written to state
loadable store > linked runnable > reflects the linked runnable when set
createLocalMolecule > create > returns a local-prefixed ID
createLocalMolecule > create > stores the created entity in the data atom
createLocalMolecule > create > merges provided data with createDefault values
createLocalMolecule > create > tracks the new ID in allIds
createLocalMolecule > create > applies the transform function after creating
createLocalMolecule > create > calls validate and passes when data is valid
createLocalMolecule > createWithId > stores the entity under the given ID
createLocalMolecule > update > merges partial changes into existing entity
createLocalMolecule > update > applies transform after updating
createLocalMolecule > update > is a no-op (with a warning) when the entity does not exist
createLocalMolecule > delete > removes the entity from the data atom
createLocalMolecule > delete > removes the ID from allIds
createLocalMolecule > clear > removes all entities
createLocalMolecule > derived atoms > isDirty is true when data exists
createLocalMolecule > derived atoms > isDirty is false after entity is deleted
createLocalMolecule > derived atoms > isNew is always true
createLocalMolecule > derived atoms > serverData is always null
createLocalMolecule > derived atoms > query is always successful and non-pending
createLocalMolecule > derived atoms > allIds is empty initially
createLocalMolecule > imperative getters > get.data returns the entity
createLocalMolecule > imperative getters > get.all returns all entities
createLocalMolecule > imperative getters > get.allIds returns all IDs
createLocalMolecule > molecule metadata > exposes the molecule name
createLocalMolecule > molecule metadata > exposes source as 'local'
createMolecule > server data > data atom returns server entity when no draft exists
createMolecule > server data > data atom returns null when entity is not in server state
createMolecule > server data > serverData atom returns the raw server entity
createMolecule > transform > applies transform to server data before exposing it
createMolecule > draft operations > update reducer merges changes into draft
createMolecule > draft operations > update accumulates across multiple calls
createMolecule > draft operations > isDirty is false before any update
createMolecule > draft operations > isDirty is true after an update
createMolecule > draft operations > discard reducer clears draft and restores server state
createMolecule > draft operations > draft atom is null before any update
createMolecule > draft operations > draft atom holds the pending changes after update
createMolecule > custom merge > uses the provided merge function to combine server + draft
createMolecule > soft delete > delete reducer marks entity as deleted
createMolecule > soft delete > deletedIds atom contains the deleted ID
createMolecule > soft delete > restore reducer removes entity from deleted set
createMolecule > soft delete > isDeleted is false initially
createMolecule > local entity creation > create reducer adds generated ID to newIds
createMolecule > local entity creation > generated ID starts with 'new-'
createMolecule > local entity creation > multiple creates each produce a unique ID
createMolecule > isNew detection > IDs starting with 'new-' are considered new
createMolecule > isNew detection > IDs starting with 'local-' are considered new
createMolecule > isNew detection > regular IDs are not new
createMolecule > isNew detection > custom isNewEntity function overrides default
createMolecule > imperative API > get.data returns entity data
createMolecule > imperative API > get.isDirty returns false before any update
createMolecule > imperative API > set.update changes data via imperative API
createMolecule > imperative API > set.discard reverts to server state
createMolecule > imperative API > set.create returns the generated ID
createMolecule > imperative API > set.delete marks entity as deleted
createMolecule > imperative API > set.restore removes entity from deleted set
createMolecule > lifecycle > fires onMount callback when serverData atom is first accessed
createMolecule > lifecycle > fires onMount only once per ID, not on repeated access
createMolecule > lifecycle > fires onUnmount callback when cleanup.remove is called
createMolecule > lifecycle > lifecycle.isActive returns true after first access
createMolecule > lifecycle > lifecycle.isActive returns false after cleanup.remove
createMolecule > molecule metadata > exposes the molecule name
normalizeValueForComparison > empty and nullish values > returns '' for null
normalizeValueForComparison > empty and nullish values > returns '' for undefined
normalizeValueForComparison > empty and nullish values > returns '' for empty string
normalizeValueForComparison > plain strings > returns the string unchanged when it is not valid JSON
normalizeValueForComparison > plain strings > returns the string unchanged when it contains special characters
normalizeValueForComparison > JSON strings (key-order normalisation) > sorts keys so {b,a} and {a,b} are equal
normalizeValueForComparison > JSON strings (key-order normalisation) > returns canonical JSON with keys sorted alphabetically
normalizeValueForComparison > JSON strings (key-order normalisation) > handles nested objects — sorts keys at every level
normalizeValueForComparison > JSON strings (key-order normalisation) > handles arrays of objects inside JSON strings
normalizeValueForComparison > JSON strings (key-order normalisation) > treats a JSON string and the equivalent object as equal
normalizeValueForComparison > objects > serializes a plain object with sorted keys
normalizeValueForComparison > objects > handles empty object
normalizeValueForComparison > objects > handles nested objects
normalizeValueForComparison > objects > handles arrays
normalizeValueForComparison > primitives > converts numbers to string
normalizeValueForComparison > primitives > converts true to string
normalizeValueForComparison > primitives > converts false to string
normalizeValueForComparison > primitives > converts 0 to string
resolveSchemaRef > returns the node unchanged when there is no $ref
resolveSchemaRef > resolves a $defs reference
resolveSchemaRef > resolves a #/definitions reference
resolveSchemaRef > returns the node as-is when the ref target is missing
resolveSchemaRef > returns empty object for non-object input
resolveSchemaType > returns the type from a plain schema node
resolveSchemaType > resolves the type through a $ref
resolveSchemaType > defaults to 'string' when type is not present
extractLastPathSegment > returns a plain name unchanged
extractLastPathSegment > extracts the last segment from a JSONPath expression
extractLastPathSegment > handles JSONPath with array brackets
extractLastPathSegment > extracts the last segment from a JSON Pointer
extractLastPathSegment > extracts the last segment from dot notation
extractLastPathSegment > returns the key unchanged when there is no path syntax
extractLastPathSegment > returns the input unchanged for an empty string
formatKeyAsName > converts snake_case to Title Case
formatKeyAsName > splits camelCase on word boundaries
formatKeyAsName > capitalises the first letter
formatKeyAsName > strips JSONPath prefix before formatting
formatKeyAsName > strips JSON Pointer prefix before formatting
groupTemplateVariables > returns an empty array for empty input
groupTemplateVariables > groups a plain variable into the inputs envelope
groupTemplateVariables > groups a JSONPath variable into the correct envelope
groupTemplateVariables > groups an output-envelope variable separately
groupTemplateVariables > collapses sub-path references into an object-typed group
groupTemplateVariables > mixes simple and object variables without merging them
groupTemplateVariables > deduplicates identical variables
groupTemplateVariables > ignores invalid template variables
extractInputPortsFromSchema > returns empty array for null or empty schema
extractInputPortsFromSchema > maps each schema property to a port
extractInputPortsFromSchema > marks required fields
extractInputPortsFromSchema > uses the schema title as the port name when present
extractInputPortsFromSchema > falls back to formatKeyAsName when title is absent
extractInputPortsFromSchema > filters out system fields annotated with x-ag-* markers
extractInputPortsFromSchema > resolves $ref properties
extractOutputPortsFromSchema > returns empty array for null input
extractOutputPortsFromSchema > returns a single 'output' port for a simple type schema
extractOutputPortsFromSchema > maps object schema properties to individual ports
extractOutputPortsFromSchema > returns a single unknown port for an object schema without properties
extractSystemFieldNames > returns an empty set for null input
extractSystemFieldNames > returns an empty set when no properties are system fields
extractSystemFieldNames > identifies fields annotated with x-ag-* markers
initial state > pendingColumnOps starts with empty add/remove/rename
initial state > pendingRowOps starts with empty add/remove
initial state > hasPendingChanges is false initially
initial state > different revision IDs are isolated
addColumnReducer > adds a column key to the add list
addColumnReducer > hasPendingChanges becomes true after adding a column
addColumnReducer > does not add a duplicate key
addColumnReducer > un-removes a previously removed column instead of adding
addColumnReducer > accumulates multiple column adds
removeColumnReducer > removes a pending-add column from the add list (no remove entry)
removeColumnReducer > marks a server (non-pending) column for removal
removeColumnReducer > does not duplicate a column in the remove list
renameColumnReducer > renames a pending-add column in the add list
renameColumnReducer > appends a rename entry for a server column
renameColumnReducer > updates an existing rename entry instead of duplicating
addRowReducer > adds a provided row ID to pending adds
addRowReducer > returns the row ID that was added
addRowReducer > generates a new- prefixed ID when no rowId is provided
addRowReducer > hasPendingChanges is true after adding a row
addRowReducer > does not duplicate an already-pending add
removeRowReducer > cancels a pending-add row (removes from add[], no remove entry)
removeRowReducer > marks a server row for deletion
removeRowReducer > does not duplicate a server row in remove list
removeRowsReducer > removes multiple rows at once
removeRowsReducer > cancels pending-add rows without adding to remove list
clearPendingOpsReducer > resets all column ops to empty
clearPendingOpsReducer > resets all row ops to empty
clearPendingOpsReducer > hasPendingChanges is false after clearing
clearPendingOpsReducer > clear for one revision does not affect another
hasPendingChangesAtomFamily > is false with no operations
hasPendingChangesAtomFamily > is true with a pending column add
hasPendingChangesAtomFamily > is true with a pending column remove
hasPendingChangesAtomFamily > is true with a pending column rename
hasPendingChangesAtomFamily > is true with a pending row add
hasPendingChangesAtomFamily > is true with a pending row remove
testcaseMolecule shape > exposes 'testcase' as the molecule name
testcaseMolecule shape > exposes atoms namespace
testcaseMolecule shape > exposes actions namespace
testcaseMolecule shape > exposes top-level id tracking atoms
testcaseMolecule shape > exposes loadable capability namespace
testcaseMolecule shape > exposes get namespace with imperative getters
ID tracking atoms > ids starts empty
ID tracking atoms > newIds starts empty
ID tracking atoms > deletedIds starts as empty Set
ID tracking atoms > atoms.displayRowIds is empty initially
ID tracking atoms > atoms.hasUnsavedChanges is false initially
ID tracking atoms > atoms.revisionId is null initially
actions.add > returns a result with an ID
actions.add > returns a result with a new- prefixed ID
actions.add > adds the entity ID to newIds
actions.add > hasUnsavedChanges is true after adding a testcase
actions.add > the added ID appears in displayRowIds
actions.add > multiple adds produce unique IDs
actions.add > stored data includes the provided fields
actions.add > adding with no data succeeds with empty data object
actions.delete > removes a local (new-*) testcase from newIds completely
actions.delete > clears the draft when removing a local testcase
actions.delete > removes deleted local testcase from displayRowIds
actions.delete > accepts an array of IDs for batch delete
actions.delete > soft-deletes a server entity (adds to deletedIds)
displayRowIds and hasUnsavedChanges > displayRowIds includes new entities
displayRowIds and hasUnsavedChanges > displayRowIds excludes deleted local entities
displayRowIds and hasUnsavedChanges > hasUnsavedChanges returns false when no entities present
displayRowIds and hasUnsavedChanges > hasUnsavedChanges returns false after deleting the only added entity
actions.create > creates multiple testcases from rows
actions.create > all created IDs are unique
actions.create > created IDs appear in newIds
actions.create > returns zero count for empty rows array
selection draft > selection draft starts as null
selection draft > setSelectionDraft populates the draft with provided IDs
selection draft > discardSelectionDraft clears the draft back to null
selection draft > commitSelectionDraft updates testcaseIdsAtom to the selected set
selection draft > commitSelectionDraft clears the draft
selection draft > drafts for different revisions are isolated
testsetMolecule shape > exposes 'testset' as the molecule name
testsetMolecule shape > exposes atoms namespace
testsetMolecule shape > exposes actions namespace
testsetMolecule shape > exposes get namespace with imperative read functions
testsetMolecule shape > exposes set namespace with imperative write functions
testsetMolecule shape > exposes filters namespace
testsetMolecule shape > exposes paginated namespace
testsetMolecule shape > exposes latestRevision namespace
testsetMolecule shape > exposes invalidate namespace
testsetMolecule shape > exposes lifecycle namespace
isNewTestsetId > returns true for new- prefixed IDs
isNewTestsetId > returns true for local- prefixed IDs
isNewTestsetId > returns false for regular UUID-like IDs
isNewTestsetId > returns false for null
isNewTestsetId > returns false for undefined
testset filter atoms > searchTerm atom starts as empty string
testset filter atoms > searchTerm can be written and read back
testset filter atoms > dateCreated atom starts as null
testset filter atoms > dateCreated can be written and read back
testset filter atoms > dateModified atom starts as null
testset filter atoms > different store instances are isolated
testset draft operations > isDirty is false before any update
testset draft operations > isDirty is true after calling actions.update
testset draft operations > draft atom reflects the staged changes
testset draft operations > actions.update accumulates across multiple calls
testset draft operations > actions.discard clears the draft and isDirty becomes false
testset draft operations > changes to one ID do not affect another
testset local entity creation > set.create returns a new- prefixed ID
testset local entity creation > multiple creates return unique IDs
testset local entity creation > created ID is recognized as new by isNewTestsetId
testset null-safe selectors > queryOptional(null) returns an atom with isPending=false and data=null
testset null-safe selectors > queryOptional(undefined) returns an atom with isPending=false and data=null
testset null-safe selectors > dataOptional(null) returns null
testset null-safe selectors > dataOptional(undefined) returns null
testset null-safe selectors > queryOptional with a valid ID returns an atom (delegates to query family)
entity molecule imports (Node env smoke) > testset molecule imports without throwing
entity molecule imports (Node env smoke) > testcase molecule imports without throwing
entity molecule imports (Node env smoke) > trace molecule imports without throwing
entity molecule imports (Node env smoke) > environment molecule imports without throwing
